enumDefs.name: analysis_access_level
enumDefs.description: Access control levels for archetype nodes analysis

elementDefs.description: Access limited to high-level or aggregated data
Access to full detailed or record-level data

classificationDefs.name: archetype_node_analysis_permissions
classificationDefs.description: Specifies allowed analysis depth for an archetype node (NONE, HIGH_LEVEL, DETAILED).

classificationDefs.name: participant_PII
classificationDefs.description: Used for classifying a data which contains participant personal information, hence indicating confidential private

classificationDefs.name: participant_NON_PII
classificationDefs.description: Used for classifying a data which contains participant non personal information, hence indicating confidential lesser than private
